title: Irish Beef Roast
description: A hearty, gluten-free Irish dish featuring a roasted beef roast.
instructions: Season the beef roast with salt, black pepper, and fresh thyme.
Heat a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat. Sear the beef roast until browned on all sides, about 2-3 minutes per side.
Transfer the beef roast to a roasting pan and place the potatoes, carrots, and irish butter around it.
Roast in the preheated oven for 2-3 hours, or until the beef reaches 135°F (57°C) for medium-rare.
Let the beef rest for 10-15 minutes before slicing and serving.
